page.title: See the whole picture before choosing where to begin

recent.title: Recent Records
recent.description: Start by seeing yourself through recent events and recent words.

logic.title: Page Logic
logic.description: Make the reason for this workspace structure clear first.

pulse.title: Today’s Observations
pulse.description: Give yourself an honest enough starting point.

quick.title: Quick Entry
quick.description: Start with action, then decide whether to open it further.

record.title: Recording Workbench
record.detail: Reflection, events, finance, and living items capture how you are actually living right now.

inner.title: Inner State
inner.detail: The emotions page carries recent psychological waves, triggers, and recovery methods that work for you.

selfMap.title: Self Map
selfMap.detail: Beliefs, principles, relationships, growth, and memories explain why you have become this version of yourself.

legacyFuture.title: Legacy and Future
legacyFuture.detail: Legacy organizes important words and entrusted matters, while the future blueprint brings ideal self and stage paths forward.

reflection.label: Write a reflection
reflection.description: Put down the thoughts and feelings of this moment first.

events.label: Record an event
events.description: Add a timeline fragment and keep a recent life detail.

finance.label: Record spending
finance.description: Make real choices and lifestyle evidence visible.

emotion.label: View emotion waves
emotion.description: See recent inner weather and triggers together.

future.label: Clarify future direction
future.description: Make ideal self and lifestyle clearer.

beliefs.label: Open belief map
beliefs.description: See how your worldview and values currently look.

relationships.label: Review relationships
relationships.description: Put important people, patterns, and unsaid words in one place.

journey.label: Review growth memories
journey.description: Reconnect life stages, memory nodes, places, and objects.

legacy.label: Organize entrusted words
legacy.description: Place words, concerns, and instructions for the future.

currentFocus.title: Current Focus
currentFocus.description: Bring the new modules onto the same desk first, so they can be viewed, switched, and grounded in basic data.

empty.recent: No recent records match the current filter.
